title: SLAM Tutorial: Robust Mapping for Dynamic Scenes
summary: Learn a robust SLAM stack with loop-closure tuning and dynamic-object filtering for real indoor robots.
body: This tutorial compares visual-inertial and lidar-assisted mapping setups.
We discuss map consistency checks and drift mitigation under human traffic.
The final section integrates maps into downstream manipulation tasks.
